label: Territorial Control
description: Percentage of country under effective central government control

label: Political Violence
description: Level of conflict-related deaths, terrorism, state repression

label: Institutional Functioning
description: Do state institutions (courts, legislature, bureaucracy, elections) operate?

label: Civil Liberties
description: Freedom of expression, assembly, religion, movement

label: Elite Cohesion
description: Is the ruling coalition stable or fragmenting? Risk of coups?

label: Military Expenditure
description: Military spending as a share of GDP (higher spending = lower state health score)

label: Political Stability
description: Perceptions of likelihood of political instability and politically motivated violence (WGI PV.EST; higher = more stable)

label: Gov't Effectiveness
description: Perceptions of quality of public services, civil service, and policy formulation (WGI GE.EST; higher = better)

label: GDP per Capita
description: Living standards relative to baseline (indexed to peak)

label: Inflation
description: Price stability (annual consumer price inflation rate)

label: Unemployment
description: Labor market health (official unemployment rate)

label: Trade Openness
description: Economic integration with world ((Exports + Imports) / GDP)

label: Resource Rents
description: Total natural resource rents as % of GDP (resource-curse framing: high rents = structural vulnerability)

label: Youth Unemployment
description: Unemployment rate among 15-24 year olds (% of youth labor force)

label: Inequality (Gini)
description: Gini coefficient measuring income inequality (0 = perfect equality, 100 = perfect inequality)

label: NEET Rate
description: Youth not in education, employment, or training as % of youth population (lower = better)

label: Adj. GDP/Capita (Gini)
description: GDP per capita adjusted for inequality: GDP_pc × (1 − Gini/100); combines income level and distribution

label: Poverty Rate ($2.15/day)
description: Population below $2.15/day international poverty line (% of population; lower = better)

label: Adj. GDP/Capita PPP (Gini)
description: PPP-adjusted GDP per capita corrected for inequality: GDP_pc_PPP × (1 − Gini/100)

label: Export Diversification
description: Herfindahl-Hirschman Index of export concentration by product (0–1; lower = more diversified = better)

label: Non-Resource Exports
description: Non-fuel, non-mineral exports as % of total merchandise exports (higher = less resource-dependent)

label: Fiscal Health
description: Government debt sustainability, budget balance

label: Sanctions
description: Degree of international economic restrictions

label: Diplomatic Integration
description: Recognition, embassy presence, membership in international bodies

label: Foreign Military
description: External military involvement (sovereignty indicator)

label: FDI
description: Foreign Direct Investment inflows as indicator of international business confidence

label: Refugee Flows
description: Population displacement as indicator of crisis severity

label: Budget Transparency
description: Can citizens see how public money is raised and spent?

label: Press Freedom
description: Can journalists investigate government and publish findings?

label: Statistical Transparency
description: Does the government produce credible, timely socioeconomic data?

label: Legal Transparency
description: Are laws, regulations, and court decisions accessible and predictable?

label: Extractive Transparency
description: For oil/gas states, are revenues from natural resources disclosed?

label: Control of Corruption
description: Perceptions of the extent to which public power is exercised for private gain (WGI CC.EST; higher = less corrupt = better)

label: Net Migration
description: Net migration rate per 1,000 population per year (positive = inflow, negative = outflow)

label: Remittances
description: Personal remittances received as % of GDP (supplementary economic resilience indicator)

label: Life Expectancy
description: Life expectancy at birth in years (higher = better)

label: Infant Mortality
description: Infant mortality rate per 1,000 live births (lower = better)

label: Internet Users
description: Individuals using the Internet as % of population (higher = better)

label: Health Expenditure
description: Current health expenditure as % of GDP (higher = better)

label: Education Expenditure
description: Government expenditure on education as % of GDP (higher = better)

label: Human Dev. Index (HDI)
description: UNDP Human Development Index (0–1): geometric mean of life expectancy, education, and GNI per capita indices (higher = better)
